title: ceraia pachyphylla
intro: Ceraia pachyphylla, also known as the Asian coral tree or Coral Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ceraia pachyphylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
